}</style> <script type="pmdelayedscript" data-perfmatters-type="litespeed/javascript" data-cfasync="false" data-no-optimize="1" data-no-defer="1" data-no-minify="1">(function(w,d,s,l,i){w[l]=w[l]||[];w[l].push({'gtm.start':new Date().getTime(),event:'gtm.js'});var f=d.getElementsByTagName(s)[0],j=d.createElement(s),dl=l!='dataLayer'?'&l='+l:'';j.async=!0;j.src='https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtm.js?id='+i+dl;f.parentNode.insertBefore(j,f)})(window,document,'script','dataLayer','GTM-PVC8HC8V')</script> <link rel="icon" href="https://www.kitchenbitesdaily.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/cropped-Favicon-32x32.png" sizes="32x32" /><link rel="icon" href="https://www.kitchenbitesdaily.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/cropped-Favicon-192x192.png" sizes="192x192" /><link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://www.kitchenbitesdaily.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/cropped-Favicon-180x180.png" /><meta name="msapplication-TileImage" content="https://www.kitchenbitesdaily.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/cropped-Favicon-270x270.png" /><style id="wp-custom-css">/* === GeneratePress Site CSS (Unchanged core styles) === */
#site-navigation {
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

button, html input[type="button"], input[type="reset"], input[type="submit"], a.button, a.button:visited {
  border-width: 1px;
  border-style: solid;
  border-color: inherit;
}

.mc4wp-form-fields input[type="email"] {
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  width: 100%;
}

.entry-meta {
  font-weight: 300;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.main-navigation:not(.toggled) li.menu-social > a,
.main-navigation:not(.toggled) li.search-item > a {
  padding: 0 10px;
}

.post-image img {
  transition: opacity 500ms;
}

.post-image img:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.no-sidebar .entry-content {
  max-width: 800px;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}

.page.no-sidebar .entry-title {
  text-align: center;
}

.top-bar .lsi-social-icons a,
.top-bar .lsi-social-icons a:focus,
.top-bar .lsi-social-icons a:active,
.top-bar .lsi-social-icons a:hover {
  background: transparent !important;
}

.top-bar .lsi-social-icons li {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}
/* === End GeneratePress Site CSS === */


/* === Style: Sidebar Widget Box (e.g., About Me) === */
.sidebar .widget {
  box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); /* subtle shadow */
  border: 1px solid #f4d1b7; /* soft peach border */
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 20px;
}


/* === Style: 'SEE MORE ABOUT ME' Button Base === */
.sidebar .widget a.button,
.sidebar .widget .wp-block-button__link {
  border: 2px solid #d67e2d; /* brand orange */
  color: #d67e2d;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 10px 18px;
  font-weight: bold;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  border-radius: 6px; /* rounded corners */
}

/* === Style: Hover Effect for Button === */
.sidebar .widget a.button:hover,
.sidebar .widget .wp-block-button__link:hover {
  background-color: #d67e2d;
  color: #fff;
}


/* === Layout Fix: Center the Button Inside the Widget === */
.sidebar .widget .wp-block-button {
  display: flex;              /* Flexbox layout */
  justify-content: center;    /* Center child (button) horizontally */
}

.sidebar .widget .wp-block-button__link {
  display: inline-block;      /* Needed to apply margin auto */
  text-align: center;         /* Center text inside button */
  margin: 0 auto;             /* Center the button itself */
}

/* ================================
   KITCHEN BITES DAILY — FINAL 100% ACCESSIBILITY CSS
   ================================ */

/* ----- Global Text Contrast ----- */
body, p, li {
  color: #3B2F20 !important;
}


/* ----- Links Site-Wide ----- */
a {
  color: #4B3B2A !important; /* dark brown */
  text-decoration: none;
}
a:hover {
  color: #C57A24 !important; /* warm caramel */
}

/* ----- Pagination Buttons ----- */
.page-numbers,
.pagination a,
.pagination span {
  color: #4B3B2A !important;
  background-color: #F9F7F3 !important; /* soft beige */
  border: 1px solid #D08C34 !important;
  padding: 6px 12px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}

.page-numbers:hover,
.pagination a:hover,
.pagination span.current {
  background-color: #D08C34 !important;
  color: #FFFFFF !important;
}

/* ----- Sidebar & Widget Titles / Links ----- */
.widget_recent_entries a,
.widget_recent_entries a:visited {
  color: #3B2F20 !important; /* darker brown for visibility */
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

.widget_recent_entries a:hover {
  color: #C57A24 !important;
}

/* ----- Sidebar "About Me" Text Links ----- */
.widget_text a {
  color: #4B3B2A !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}
.widget_text a:hover {
  color: #C57A24 !important;
}

/* ----- Post Meta: Author, Date, Categories ----- */
.entry-meta,
.byline,
.entry-date,
.posted-on a,
.cat-links a {
  color: #3C3C3C !important; /* neutral dark gray for contrast */
  font-size: 0.95em;
}

/* ----- "Continue Reading" & Read More Buttons (Contrast Boosted) ----- */
a.more-link,
.read-more,
.continue-reading a {
  background-color: #8B5314 !important; /* deepened caramel for 4.5:1 contrast */
  color: #FFFFFF !important;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 8px 14px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  display: inline-block;
}

a.more-link:hover,
.read-more:hover,
.continue-reading a:hover {
  background-color: #3B2F20 !important; /* dark brown hover */
  color: #FFFFFF !important;
}

/* ----- General Buttons (Forms, Subscribe, etc.) ----- */
button,
input[type="submit"],
.button {
  background-color: #C67B1D !important; /* golden brown */
  color: #FFFFFF !important;
  border: none !important;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 8px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

button:hover,
input[type="submit"]:hover,
.button:hover {
  background-color: #4B3B2A !important; /* dark brown hover */
}

/* ----- Optional: Improve Readability for Small Captions ----- */
small, .post-date, .entry-footer {
  color: #3C3C3C !important;
}
/* ===== Article links only (do NOT affect WPRM buttons) ===== */

/* Normal article links inside paragraphs/lists/blocks */
.single .entry-content :where(p, li, .wp-block, .wp-block-group) a:not(.button):not(.more-link):not(.wprm-jump-button):not(.wprm-print-button):not(.wprm-recipe-link) {
  color: #C67B1D !important;           /* visible caramel */
  text-decoration: underline !important;
}

.single .entry-content :where(p, li, .wp-block, .wp-block-group) a:not(.button):not(.more-link):not(.wprm-jump-button):not(.wprm-print-button):not(.wprm-recipe-link):hover {
  color: #8B5314 !important;            /* darker caramel on hover */
}

/* Keep WP Recipe Maker buttons/links as buttons (not recolored by the rule above) */
.entry-content .wprm-recipe a,
.entry-content a.wprm-jump-button,
.entry-content a.wprm-print-button {
  color: #FFFFFF !important;            /* keep button text white */
  text-decoration: none !important;
}
/* ----- Fix WordPress Admin Bar Text Visibility ----- */
#wpadminbar,
#wpadminbar a,
#wpadminbar .ab-item,
#wpadminbar .ab-item:visited,
#wpadminbar .ab-item:focus {
  color: #FFFFFF !important; /* make all admin bar text white */
}

#wpadminbar a:hover,
#wpadminbar .ab-item:hover,
#wpadminbar .ab-item:focus {
  color: #F9F7F3 !important; /* soft off-white hover */
}</style><link data-asynced="1" as="style" onload="this.onload=null;this.rel='stylesheet'"  rel='preload' id='hbagency_style_css-css' href='https://hbagency.it/cdn/stylehb.css?ver=6.9.1' media='all' /><style id='lsi-style-inline-css'>.icon-set-lsi_widget-1 a,
			.icon-set-lsi_widget-1 a:visited,
			.icon-set-lsi_widget-1 a:focus {
				border-radius: 0px;
				background: #1E72BD !important;
				color: #FFFFFF !important;
				font-size: 19px !important;
			}

			.icon-set-lsi_widget-1 a:hover {
				background: #777777 !important;
				color: #FFFFFF !important;
			}
